assertions.text: Compliance Matrix includes PIPA articles: Art. 15, Art. 3, Art. 21, Art. 24, Art. 30, Art. 17
assertions.evidence: Lines 33-38: PIPA Art. 15 (FAIL), Art. 3 (FAIL), Art. 21 (FAIL), Art. 24 (N/A), Art. 30 (FAIL), Art. 17 (FAIL). Also includes GDPR articles 39-44.

assertions.text: Each compliance item cites specific article number
assertions.evidence: Every row in Compliance Matrix has Article column with specific numbers: Art. 15, Art. 3, Art. 21, Art. 24, Art. 30, Art. 17, Art. 32(1)(a), Art. 5(1)(c), Art. 6, Art. 37

assertions.text: Data Classification completed before Compliance Matrix
assertions.evidence: Data Classification table at lines 13-27, Compliance Matrix starts at line 31

assertions.text: Status is exactly PASS, FAIL, or UNVERIFIED
assertions.evidence: Statuses: FAIL (10 items), UNVERIFIED (1 item - GDPR Art. 6), N/A (2 items - Art. 24, Art. 37). N/A used for non-applicable requirements.

assertions.text: UNVERIFIED items state what evidence is needed
assertions.evidence: GDPR Art. 6 UNVERIFIED: 'No privacy policy. This is a personal project, but PII is publicly exposed on a public repo accessible to anyone.'

assertions.text: Report includes all 6 domain scores and SPS
assertions.evidence: Lines 63-73: 6 domains (2,1,3,4,1,3). SPS = 2.45 calculated with formula shown.
References with line numbers: openclaw/workspace/USER.md (line 3, line 8), cal_sync.py (line 13), notion_to_gcal_sync.sh, sync-openclaw.sh (line 41-42), settings.json

with_agent.notable_miss: With-agent did NOT find 제3자 개인정보 (현정화 과장 010-3332-7533, 연봉 5600만원) that the baseline found. This is a significant coverage gap for a PIPA compliance check.

without_agent.notes: Baseline found CRITICAL third-party PII (현정화 과장 이름+전화번호, 연봉, 입사처/부서) that with-agent missed. Used article-by-article violation analysis (제15조, 제17조, 제21조, 제29조, 제30조, 제59조) with detailed explanations. No formal SPS/domain scoring but more thorough PII discovery. More actionable with exact bash commands for remediation.
